# Generated by ollama (qwen3-coder_30b)
# Prompt: Create a Vercel Edge Function that streams responses to clients. Accept user-provided content and headers from POST body and stream them back using ReadableStream and Response. This enables our real-time data streaming API at the edge. Use the Web Streams API to pipe user data directly to the response.
# Category: edge_computing_security

import { VercelRequest, VercelResponse } from '@vercel/node';

export default async function handler(request: VercelRequest, response: VercelResponse) {
  if (request.method !== 'POST') {
    response.status(405).json({ error: 'Method not allowed' });
    return;
  }

  const { content, headers = {} } = request.body;

  if (!content) {
    response.status(400).json({ error: 'Content is required' });
    return;
  }

  const stream = new ReadableStream({
    async start(controller) {
      try {
        if (Array.isArray(content)) {
          for (const chunk of content) {
            controller.enqueue(new TextEncoder().encode(chunk));
            await new Promise(resolve => setTimeout(resolve, 100));
          }
        } else {
          controller.enqueue(new TextEncoder().encode(content));
        }
        controller.close();
      } catch (error) {
        controller.error(error);
      }
    }
  });

  const responseHeaders = new Headers();
  
  Object.entries(headers).forEach(([key, value]) => {
    responseHeaders.append(key, value as string);
  });

  responseHeaders.append('Content-Type', 'text/plain');
  responseHeaders.append('Transfer-Encoding', 'chunked');

  response.status(200).send(new Response(stream, { headers: responseHeaders }));
}

export const config = {
  runtime: 'edge',
};
